name: 熵与自由能（HL）
subject: chemistry
domain_name: 反应性 1 · 热力学 Reactivity 1 · What Drives Chemical Reactions
curriculum_points: Predict whether a reaction will be spontaneous by calculating the standard entropy change, ΔS°, for the system and the standard Gibbs free energy change, ΔG°, using the equation ΔG° = ΔH° - TΔS° (AO2).
Explain the relationship between the total entropy change (ΔS_total), the feasibility of a reaction, and the temperature at which a reaction becomes spontaneous (AO3).

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID，常见: H2O=1H2O, NaCl=1NAC, C2H5OH=1EHT
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示
GeoGebra 化学计量比可视化
